nightmare sans is a ruthless, cruel skeleton who feeds off of the negativity of others. he had a depressing backstory, being tortured and abused by fellow villagers until the age of six. young nightmare sans takes a negativity apple from the tree, in which the tree dies. feeling cornered by angry villagers, he bites the negativity apple, changing him into what he is now.
